sections.paragraph:
Original: עדלי

Transliteration: ‛adlay

Phonetic: ad-lah'-ee

BDB Definition:

Adlai = "justice of Jehovah"
  1. ancestor of Shaphat, the overseer of David's herds

Origin: probably from an unused root of uncertain meaning

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
